title: CSP disabled (csp: null)
exploit: Any XSS sink becomes full webview script execution

title: Unscoped sql:allow-execute + allow-select
exploit: Webview can run arbitrary SQL incl. DROP TABLE
fix: Replace with typed #[tauri::command] wrappers; drop sql:* grants

title: Plaintext SQLite — no SQLCipher
exploit: Disk compromise reveals all DB content
fix: features = ["sqlcipher"]; derive key from OS keychain

title: WAL plaintext sidecar files
exploit: -wal and -shm files hold plaintext recent writes
fix: PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE) on shutdown; or pair with SQLCipher

title: Empty invoke_handler — no Rust-side gate
exploit: No typed IPC surface; validation can only live in frontend
fix: Add #[tauri::command] wrappers for every DB op

title: Startup .expect() with no sentinel
fix: Write sentinel file on failure; refuse next boot until acknowledged
